news.headline: US GDP meets expectations, Price Index and Core PCE higher than forecasted, Initial Jobless Claims fewer than anticipated.
Global Technologies, Ltd. boosts shareholder equity by exchanging preferred stock. #businessnews #stockexchange
Shareholding update: Firm reports acquisition of 15% stake in company, now holds total of 25% shares.
Walgreens Boots Alliance Q3 sales hit $36.35B, up 2.6% YoY, adjusted EPS $0.63, down 36.6%. Stock sinks after disappointing results.
news.summary: Walgreens Boots Alliance Inc (NASDAQ: WBA) posted third-quarter fiscal year 2024 sales totaling $36.35 billion, marking a 2.6% increase year over year (2.5% in constant currency), surpassing the projected $36 billion. Adjusted operating income stood at $613 million, a 36.3% drop in constant currency primarily due to reduced sale-leaseback gains and weaker U.S. retail and pharmacy performance. This was partly offset by cost-saving measures and enhanced profitability in the U.S. Healthcare segment. Adjusted EPS was reported at $0.63, down 36.6% both in reported and constant currency terms, falling short of the projected $0.71. The U.S. Retail Pharmacy segment saw third-quarter sales of $28.5 billion, up 2.3%, driven entirely by comparable pharmacy sales.

news.headline: "Serpentina" by Faith Consiglio, a YA novel featuring a queer protagonist, available on Amazon from June 27, 2024.
news.summary: The newest young adult novel, SERPENTINA by Faith Consiglio, aims to enhance diversity in the science fiction/fantasy genre. It can be purchased on Amazon, with a release date of June 27, 2024. Set in New York, this gripping novel is geared towards a younger audience and offers a fresh perspective within the sci-fi realm.

news.headline: Infobip & Community partner with Los Angeles Chargers to revolutionize fan engagement using Apple Messages for Business.
news.summary: In Chicago, Infobip, a global cloud communications platform, and Community, a leading messaging and engagement platform connecting various entities with their audiences, have teamed up with the Los Angeles Chargers. This partnership aims to leverage Apple Messages for Business to revolutionize fan engagement. The collaboration targets global brands, sports teams, film/TV studios, music labels, public figures, and artists. It seeks to provide personalized experiences at scale.

news.headline: Nalle Winery marks 40 years of winemaking in Dry Creek Valley. Producing Zinfandel and small lot wines. Founded in 1984.
news.summary: In Healdsburg, California, the Nalle Winery is marking its 40th anniversary this month. The winery, located in Sonoma County's Dry Creek Valley, has been producing estate old-vine Zinfandel and small lot wines for four decades. Founded by Doug Nalle in 1984, the winery has persevered through skepticism to become a staple in the region. The next generation of the Nalle family is now carrying on the winemaking tradition. Their historic property has been a labor of passion for the family for over a century.

news.headline: Perfect Moment launches 2024 Summer Capsule Collection featuring Ibiza-inspired pieces, available globally.
news.summary: London-based company, Perfect Moment Ltd., known for its high-performance luxury skiwear and lifestyle apparel, has recently launched its Ibiza Summer Capsule Collection. The collection, available on Perfect Moment's global eCommerce platforms, showcases pieces that combine technical excellence with fashion-forward designs, allowing for a seamless transition from the ski slopes to urban, beach, and resort settings. Perfect Moment aims to offer a versatile holiday wardrobe to its customers, drawing inspiration from various sources to create a unique and stylish summer collection. The company is listed on NYSE American as PMNT.

news.headline: KV Finance Corp in Takoma, Md., adopts Input 1's Premium Billing System to bolster premium finance service amidst expansion.
news.summary: In Takoma, Maryland on June 27, 2024, KV Finance Corp shared the adoption of Input 1's Premium Billing Service (PBS) to improve its premium finance services. The company specializes in financing options for both commercial and consumer insurance premiums. This move signifies a crucial shift for KV Finance Corp as they aim to enhance their offerings in the field.

news.headline: Bombi introduces new Bēbee V2 lightweight stroller in Johnston, R.I., promising affordable comfort and durability for consumers.
news.summary: The new Bēbee V2, created by Bombi and based in Johnston, R.I., is a cost-effective option that prioritizes comfort and longevity while being environmentally friendly. This upgraded version of the award-winning eco-friendly Bēbee stroller offers enhanced lightweight features and luxuries. The launch took place on June 27, 2024, and the product is designed to provide affordability without compromising on quality or sustainability.

news.headline: Top loan officer Alex Rayner partners with Service First Mortgage to launch Haymaker Home Loans in Houston, June 27, 2024.
news.summary: In Houston on June 27, 2024, a collaboration was unveiled between Alex Rayner and Service First Mortgage to create an innovative mortgage company catering specifically to high-performing loan officers. Rayner, a well-known top producer in the industry, has joined forces with Service First Mortgage in a strategic partnership aimed at driving success for top-performing professionals in the mortgage sector.

news.headline: New funding available from Preeclampsia Foundation to eliminate pre-term deliveries; seeking Letters of Intent for Peter Joseph Pappas Research Grants to accelerate research.
news.summary: In Melbourne, Florida, as of June 27, 2024, the Preeclampsia Foundation has announced its call for Letters of Intent for the Peter Joseph Pappas Research Grants program. This initiative aims to expedite preeclampsia research by offering funding opportunities. The primary objective of this grant program is to facilitate research endeavors that will advance understanding and treatment of preeclampsia.

news.headline: BASports.com excels in MLB handicapping with 46 #1 finishes; CEO Dr. Bob Akmens on a roll for current season.
news.summary: Renowned expert Dr. Bob Akmens has achieved an impressive 46 top finishes in national MLB Baseball handicapping contests. The founder and CEO of BASports.com, Dr. Akmens, based in Wauchula, Florida, is having a remarkable season in MLB Baseball. With a sterling track record spanning 46 years, BASports.com continues to dominate as America's leading source for sports handicapping.

news.headline: Meta-analysis of 16 review articles by Pusan National University reveals decodable texts moderately enhance decoding skills, slightly improve word reading abilities.
news.summary: A recent meta-analysis of 16 review articles revealed that decodable texts have a moderate impact on improving decoding skills and a slight effect on enhancing word reading abilities. The study was conducted in Busan, South Korea, and the findings were released on June 27, 2024. The analysis underscores the importance of reading as a fundamental skill that significantly influences academic performance, career opportunities, and social interactions.

news.headline: Company pays for crucial easement, starts drilling program, and arranges funding. #CerrodePascoResources #mining #finance
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in five years. The number of new jobs created this month alone was 250,000, exceeding analysts' expectations. This marks a significant improvement in the economy, as consumer spending and business investments have also been steadily increasing. Additionally, the stock market experienced a 3% growth following this positive economic news. Experts believe that these trends indicate a strong and healthy economic recovery underway.

news.headline: Oragenics develops automated intranasal device to treat concussed patients in acute setting.
news.summary: The tool is designed for use in the early treatment phase in urgent situations.

news.headline: Global exosome diagnostics market projected to grow from USD 59M in 2024 to USD 2,347M by 2029 at CAGR of 108.9%, reaching USD 6,848M by 2032. Major drivers include increasing product commercialization and adoption of exosome biomarkers in personalized medicine. Challenges include technical complexities in exosome isolation. Market segments include exosome diagnostics dominating currently and exosome therapeutics expected to enter post 2029. Blood plasma and urine as promising sources for diagnostics. Major players include Bio-Techne, NanoFCM Inc., and System Biosciences, LLC.
news.summary: The global exosome diagnostics and therapeutics market is set to experience rapid growth, projected to increase from USD 59 million in 2024 to USD 2,347 million by 2029, showcasing a CAGR of 108.9%. By 2032, the market is estimated to reach USD 6,848 million, growing at a CAGR of 81.2% from 2024. Key drivers include product commercialization initiatives, especially in exosome therapeutics, and the adoption of exosome biomarkers for personalized medicine. However, challenges like technical complexities in exosome isolation hinder market growth. Major players in this sector include Bio-Techne, NanoFCM Inc., and System Biosciences, alongside others focusing on exosome technologies for diagnostics and therapeutics. The market is segmented into exosome diagnostics and therapeutics, with diagnostics currently dominating due to ongoing clinical trials. Exosome therapeutics are expected to enter the market post-2029. In terms of product services, the kits & reagents segment leads revenue until 2029, with instruments & services gaining traction thereafter. Exosomes sourced from blood plasma and urine hold promise for diagnostics, with the urine segment projected to lead in revenue. Overall, the exosome market shows significant potential for growth and innovation.

news.headline: Cenntro launches Logistar® 210 model in European and global markets from Freehold, N.J. via Business Wire.
news.summary: Cenntro has recently unveiled the latest Logistar® 210 model to the global market, including Europe. The new model promises to bring cutting-edge technology and innovation to the industry. This introduction marks a significant milestone for the company as they expand their product line internationally. The Logistar® 210 is expected to revolutionize the market with its advanced features and capabilities. Stay tuned for more updates on this exciting release.

news.headline: Typical Black family can afford starter home in 10 out of 50 major US metros, compared to 32 for white families.
news.summary: In a recent report by Redfin, it was revealed that the average Black household can only afford a starter home in 10 out of the 50 largest U.S. metropolitan areas, while the typical white family can afford a starter home in 32 of these metros - more than three times the amount. This study is based on the principle that a household should allocate a maximum of 30% of their income towards monthly housing expenditures. Redfin employs the terms "household" and "income" in its analysis of this data.

news.headline: New standard published by Healthcare Standards Institute aims to enhance infection control practices in healthcare using UV germicidal light disinfection. Published on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in San Antonio, the Healthcare Standards Institute (HSI), which is accredited by the American National Standards Institute (ANSI) as a Standards Developer in Healthcare Organization, announced initiatives aimed at enhancing patient outcomes and decreasing the incidence of healthcare-associated infections. These efforts are crucial in light of the increasing numbers of hospital-acquired infections, which continue to pose risks to patient safety.

news.headline: LivePerson (Nasdaq: LPSN) recognized a Strong Performer in Digital Customer Interaction Solutions for traditional enterprises.
news.summary: New York, June 27, 2024 - LivePerson, a top player in digital customer interactions for businesses, has been acknowledged as an ideal choice for traditional companies aiming for a dependable and adaptable partner for their digital evolution. The enterprise, listed on Nasdaq as LPSN, has been recognized as a Strong Performer in a recent report by Forrester.

news.headline: Delta Air Lines to discuss June quarter 2024 financial results via webcast on July 11, 2024, at 10 a.m. EDT. Live broadcast on ir.delta.com.
news.summary: In Atlanta on June 27, 2024, Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) announced a live conference call and webcast scheduled for July 11, 2024, at 10 a.m. EDT to review its financial results for the June quarter of 2024. The event will be accessible via live webcast at ir.delta.com. Following the conference, an online replay will be available.

news.headline: 80% of travelers prefer hotels with automated front desks or self-service tech. 75% prioritizing travel in 2024.
news.summary: In New York on June 27, 2024, a recent study revealed that 75% of travelers believe that Americans are placing a greater emphasis on travel in 2024. Additionally, there has been a noticeable trend towards embracing digital and self-service options while vacationing.

news.headline: beqom's 2024 Pay Equity Report: 34% lack pay equity strategy, 70% found wage gaps, only 40% aware of global standards.
news.summary: Approximately 34% of companies have yet to develop a pay equity strategy, while 70% have carried out a pay equity analysis that revealed wage discrepancies. Surprisingly, only 40% of companies are familiar with international pay equity benchmarks. This information was reported from NYON, Switzerland on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Blue Owl Capital expands client coverage in Europe with new institutional hires. Leading alternative asset manager aims to strengthen presence in region. #NYC #Finance
news.summary: Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE: OWL), a prominent alternative asset manager, has revealed its recruitment of a number of professionals based in Europe for its Institutional Team in an effort to enhance its footprint in the region. The company made this announcement on June 27, 2024 in New York.

news.headline: Clinch CEO Oz Etzioni named top Retail Media Commerce Marketer in 2024 by Path to Purchase Institute among top 25 pioneer leaders.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in New York, Oz Etzioni was honored as one of the top 25 pioneering leaders transforming retail media. The company Clinch, known for its dynamic ad serving and personalization services, as well as the Omnichannel Campaign Activation Platform, Flight Control, took pride in this recognition. Oz is the CEO and Co-Founder of Clinch, a platform that focuses on innovative retail media strategies.

news.headline: Introducing Allē Payment Plans by Cherry: Members pay over time with no hard credit checks, providers offer affordable Allergan treatments.
news.summary: Allē members can now access their favorite aesthetic treatments with the benefit of paying over time without undergoing any hard credit checks. Aesthetic providers offering Allergan Aesthetics treatments and products incur no costs for participation, allowing for increased affordability of treatments through flexible payment choices. This initiative aims to make aesthetic procedures more accessible and convenient for customers.

news.headline: Versana enables modernization of corporate loan market; J.P. Morgan achieves first-ever straight-through processing. Milestone achievement in syndicated loan market.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Versana revealed that J.P. Morgan, its founding bank, has accomplished straight-through processing (STP) on its centralized digital data platform, marking a historic first in the syndicated loan market. This achievement demonstrates significant progress for the industry by streamlining processes and improving efficiency.

news.headline: Stine Enterprises expands with two new Hawaiian Bros locations in Arizona and Texas. Phoenix and Lubbock welcome island-inspired franchise.
news.summary: A multi-unit franchisee of Hawaiian Bros has recently launched two new island-inspired locations in Phoenix, Arizona and Lubbock, Texas. The expansion marks the latest additions to the franchise's growing presence. The debut of these new locations, opened by Stine, is part of Hawaiian Bros' ongoing strategy to broaden its reach.

news.headline: Bloomberg introduces data solution for NAIC's bond project, aiding US insurers & managers; compliance by Jan 2025.
news.summary: Bloomberg has introduced a new Data License solution aimed at aiding US insurance companies and affected asset managers in managing the bond reclassification rules before the January 2025 compliance deadline. The initiative, unveiled in New York on June 27, 2024, will assist firms in navigating the required regulations. This solution is particularly crucial for entities preparing for the upcoming deadline, providing essential support in this complex regulatory landscape.

news.headline: ESET reports AI-infostealers creating deepfake videos for bank fraud. Threat Report covers Dec 2023-May 2024 trends.
news.summary: ESET recently published its most recent Threat Report, detailing trends in the threat landscape based on ESET telemetry and expert analysis covering the period from December 2023 to May 2024. Within this timeframe, there has been a concerning development where infostealers are utilizing generative AI tools like Midjourney, Sora, and Gemini to impersonate legitimate entities. The report highlights the increasing sophistication and diversification of cyber threats in the digital ecosystem.

news.headline: GK Hair launches new editorial hair collection celebrating diversity and inclusivity with models from diverse backgrounds.
news.summary: In Oakland Park, Florida, on June 27, 2024, GK Hair unveiled its newest editorial hair collection celebrating diversity and inclusivity. The collection includes models from diverse backgrounds, highlighting a total of xx unique looks. This series aims to showcase the beauty of individuality and unity.

news.headline: Medicare consultant Anyehara De Los Santos launches 'The Medicare Map' podcast on major platforms like iHeart, Spotify, and Apple Podcasts.
news.summary: In Bronx, New York on June 27, 2024, a well-known Medicare expert, Anyehara De Los Santos, has excitedly unveiled the debut of her innovative podcast called 'The Medicare Map.' This podcast will be available on popular platforms such as iHeart, Spotify, and Apple Podcasts. 'The Medicare Map' intends to reach a wide audience and serve as a valuable resource for navigating Medicare.

news.headline: Intelligent Bio Solutions grows UK retail presence, signs major retailers for Intelligent Fingerprinting Drug Screening System. #INBS #UKretail
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. (Nasdaq: INBS) revealed its growth in customer network within the UK retail industry. The expansion involves three major UK retailers, renowned as some of the largest in the country, opting for the company's Intelligent Fingerprinting Drug Screening System. INBS specializes in providing quick and non-invasive testing solutions in the medical technology sector.

news.headline: Genprex achieves milestones in 2024, treats patients in 3 lung cancer trials. Shareholder letter and update released.
news.summary: In the year 2024, Genprex, Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol GNPX, has reached various significant milestones in its clinical development journey. The company has made progress in treating 2024 patients across three clinical trials focusing on lung cancer. This news comes from Austin, Texas, as of June 27, 2024. Genprex is a clinical-stage gene therapy company that has been actively working towards advancements in patient treatment and disease management, particularly in the area of lung cancer research.

news.headline: McCormick shares rise on Q2 FY24 earnings beat, with sales at $1.643 billion, a 1% decline. Flavor Solutions down 1%, Consumer down 1%.
news.summary: McCormick & Co Inc (NYSE: MKC) saw a rise in shares following the release of their second-quarter FY24 earnings report, which exceeded expectations. Second-quarter FY24 sales dropped by 1% year-on-year to $1.643 billion, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.637 billion. Sales in the Flavor Solutions segment decreased by 1%, attributed to a 1% price increase counterbalanced by a 2% decrease in volume and product mix, along with the strategic divestment of the canning business. Meanwhile, Consumer segment sales also decreased by 1%. The full story can be found without a subscription on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Comedian Drew Desbordes named brand ambassador for Safety Shot to boost beverage awareness with consumers.
news.summary: Druski has recently become part of the company's esteemed group of creators and celebrities to increase visibility of the groundbreaking beverage among a diverse audience. This addition strengthens the portfolio of influencers, which now totals in the high numbers, boosting recognition and engagement with a broad range of consumers.

news.headline: Adoption of Enterprise Performance Management rises to 71% in 2024, up from 62% in 2023 - Dresner Advisory Study
news.summary: A recent study by Dresner Advisory on the Enterprise Performance Management market revealed that the usage of this technology has risen significantly. In 2024, 71% of businesses reported using EPM, a notable increase from 62% in 2023. This highlights a growing trend among users towards adopting EPM solutions for their enterprises, indicating the increasing importance and relevance of this technology in the business landscape.

news.headline: Iteris wins $2M contract with Texas DOT for smart mobility & traffic signal timing services. 5-year deal.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Iteris has secured a five-year Indefinite Delivery Indefinite Quantity (IDIQ) contract worth potentially $2 million with the Texas Department of Transportation (TxDOT).

news.headline: NewtekOne, Inc. declares quarterly dividend of $0.19 per share, payable on July 19, 2024 to shareholders of record by July 9, 2024.
news.summary: Today, NewtekOne, Inc. (NASDAQ: NEWT) based in Boca Raton, Florida, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.19 per share on its common stock. This announcement by the Company's Board of Directors states that the dividend will be paid on July 19, 2024, to shareholders recorded as of July 9, 2024.

news.headline: Calendar retailer selects Bridgeline Digital's HawkSearch for eCommerce website; AI technology enhances product discovery.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Woburn, Massachusetts, Bridgeline Digital, Inc. revealed that a significant calendar retailer has opted for Bridgeline's HawkSearch to enhance product discovery on its eCommerce site. Bridgeline Digital, Inc., recognized on the NASDAQ as BLIN, is a prominent player in AI-driven marketing technology. This move signifies a strategic decision by the retailer to leverage HawkSearch's capabilities for an improved customer experience.

news.headline: TP-Link launches Archer BE19000 Tri-Band Wi-Fi 7 Gaming Router for $499.99 with speeds of up to 19 Gbps.
news.summary: TP-Link, a well-known company in networking products, has launched the Archer GE800 BE19000 Tri-Band Wi-Fi 7 Gaming Router. This device, honored with the 2023 CES Innovation Award, promises incredible gaming performance. The router boasts tri-band speeds reaching up to 19 Gbps, along with two 10 Gbps ports and innovative game-acceleration capabilities. This product is aimed at gaming enthusiasts looking to elevate their gaming experiences.

news.headline: Kane Biotech sells revyve™ wound gel to ProgenaCare Global; signs manufacturing deal with Halo Pharma.
news.summary: Kane has entered into a substantial and enduring manufacturing contract with Halo Pharma. This agreement involves a significant commitment from both parties for the manufacturing of various products. The deal is set to cover a long-term duration, indicating a strong partnership between Kane and Halo Pharma. The collaboration is expected to drive growth and expansion opportunities for both companies.

news.headline: Loop Media partners with Outpatient Imaging Affiliates to enhance patient experience in imaging centers nationwide.
news.summary: Loop Media, Inc., a prominent multichannel streaming CTV platform offering curated content such as music videos, sports highlights, news, and entertainment channels, has announced a strategic partnership with Outpatient Imaging Affiliates (OIA). With Loop Media trading on NYSE American under the ticker symbol LPTV, this collaboration aims to improve the patient experience in imaging centers across the country. OIA is a top developer and operator of outpatient imaging centers, and through this partnership, both companies are set to enhance the services provided.

news.headline: Femasys showcasing products at the 40th Annual ESHRE Meeting after receiving CE Mark approval for four products.
news.summary: A prominent conference focused on women's reproductive health closely follows a significant milestone for the company, with the approval of four of its products by the EU CE Mark. This approval signifies conformity with health and safety standards for medical devices within the European Union market. The conference provides a platform for sharing insights and advancements in reproductive health, at a time when the company is poised to introduce these approved products to a wider audience.

news.headline: GAN has received CFIUS clearance for SEGA SAMMY merger, creating a leading gaming tech provider.
news.summary: GAN Limited, a prominent North American B2B technology provider of online gaming solutions, has disclosed receiving approval from the Committee on Foreign Investment in the United States (CFIUS) for its merger with a subsidiary of SEGA SAMMY CREATION INC. This approval marks a significant milestone for GAN as it moves forward with its plans. SEGA SAMMY HOLDINGS INC., the parent company of SSC, will be integral in this merger. GAN, listed on the NASDAQ under ticker symbol GAN, solidifies its position in the industry with this development.

news.headline: TSS Inc. promotes Todd Marrott to COO, effective July 1, 2024. Marrott joined as SVP of Operations in November 2022.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Total Site Solutions (TSSI), a top provider of integration technology solutions for data centers and modular services, revealed Todd Marrott's promotion to Chief Operating Officer (COO), starting July 1, 2024. Marrott, who became the Senior Vice President of Operations at TSS in November 2022, has played a crucial role in enhancing the company's operations with his extensive experience. The announcement signifies TSSI's confidence in Marrott's abilities to lead and further improve the organization.

news.headline: CytoDyn starts preclinical MASH study with SMC Laboratories, results in Fall 2024. $CYDY.
news.summary: A biotechnology company, CytoDyn Inc. (OTCQB: CYDY), based in Vancouver, Washington, shared news of the initiation of its preclinical MASH study with SMC Laboratories, Inc., anticipating results by fall 2024. The study revolves around leronlimab, a CCR5 antagonist offering potential in various therapeutic areas. This development marks a significant step in CytoDyn's research endeavors, with the outcome of the study holding importance for the company's future projects. The results, scheduled for release later this year, will provide valuable insights into the effectiveness and possible applications of leronlimab.

news.headline: Oatly partners with EF Pro Cycling, named official performance partner for men's and women's teams. Women's team now EF-Oatly-Cannondale.
news.summary: A corporation has been appointed as the "Official Performance Partner" for both the men's and women's teams, and has additionally become a co-title partner for the women's team, which is now known as "EF-Oatly-Cannondale."

news.headline: ARB IOT Group Limited is notified by Nasdaq for not meeting $1.00 minimum bid price requirement.
news.summary: On June 25, 2024, ARB IOT Group Limited (NASDAQ: ARBB), a company based in Selangor, Malaysia, specializing in IoT system integration, received a Notification Letter from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC. The letter stated that ARB is not currently meeting the minimum bid price rule of US$1.00 per share, as required by Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). This news was shared on June 27, 2024, highlighting the importance of maintaining a minimum bid price for listed securities.
